ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of daily stock data */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the options related to the stock */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trading session */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the data */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the stock */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., stock exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_stock_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_stock_data_trading_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification within the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the trading session */,
  "market_open" TEXT /* Time when the market opens on that date */,
  "market_close" TEXT /* Time when the market closes on that date */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the day is a holiday */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, pre-market, after-hours) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the session */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of trades for the session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price drop) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been triggered */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set or triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_interval" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the user should be notified (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily_summary, performance_analysis) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for generating the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles with whom the report is shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security associated with the price */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily stock data record */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the security at a specific time */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades at the historical price */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Adjusted price for the historical price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES daily_stock_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
